note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Mateo's uneasy sleep is disrupted by an unsettling, unexplained noise. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo discovers a cryptic message on his computer from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo discovers a cryptic message on his computer from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.body: Beat 5: Mateo discovers a cryptic message on his encrypted phone from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.body: Beat 6: Mateo discovers a cryptic message on his encrypted phone from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his secure phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Mateo discovers a cryptic message on his computer from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Mateo analyzes the lottery algorithm, searching for a hidden pattern or clue. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Mateo's anxiety spikes as he realizes the improbable odds of winning. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Mateo discovers a cryptic message on his computer from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo's paranoia peaks as he deletes the lottery app, sensing an unseen observer. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Dish Notices") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
